backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a chat backend with a ChatMessage type, storing up to 500 messages in memory, and exposing `getMessages(since)` and `postMessage` query/update calls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three fix features (blank page, app mount, auth init) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference for build planning and code navigation.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Global Chat', applies Discord-themed background colors to prevent blank flash before React mounts, and loads the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that synchronously checks localStorage for an active session via a lazy useState initializer and renders either LandingPage or ChatPage with no loading state.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component with tabbed UI (moderation, server, chat, message, more) exposing owner-only controls like ban, unban, mute, unmute, slow mode, big messages, forced messages, and more via BroadcastChannel and localStorage.
frontend/src/components/AIChatButton.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the floating G.AI Chat toggle button component.
frontend/src/components/AIChatPanel.tsx: Empty file placeholder for the G.AI Chat panel component powered by OpenAI ChatGPT.
Empty file placeholder for the birthday overlay component.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Scrollable chat area component rendering messages with Discord hex colors, supporting pinned messages, MOTD banners, user highlights, system messages, and big/forced message styles via BroadcastChannel and localStorage.
frontend/src/components/ConfettiBurst.ts: Animated confetti burst overlay that renders 80 randomly positioned colored particles falling with CSS animations and auto-dismisses after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationToas: Fixed-position confirmation toast for destructive actions with a 5-second auto-dismiss timer, confirm and cancel buttons, and a trash icon.
A chat message input bar component that enforces mute, ban, slow mode, chat lock, and shadowban restrictions before sending messages, with auto-resizing textarea and emoji picker toggle support.
frontend/src/components/MOTDBanner.tsx: Dismissible message-of-the-day banner displayed at the top of the chat area with a megaphone icon and blue Discord-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/OwnerShutdownBan: A banner component displayed to the owner during server shutdown, showing a countdown timer, optional shutdown message, and a 'Start Up Now' button.
frontend/src/components/PinnedMessageBar: Displays a pinned message bar with the message author and text, and an unpin button visible only to the owner.
frontend/src/components/SecretEmojiPicke: A hidden emoji picker panel with a curated set of 'secret' emojis, toggled via Ctrl+Alt and closeable via Escape or clicking outside.
A full-screen overlay shown to non-owner users during server shutdown, displaying a countdown timer and optional shutdown message.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: A Discord-style sidebar showing text/voice channels and a list of online users with avatars, owner badges, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/StartupOverlay.t: A full-screen overlay shown when the server is starting up, auto-dismissing after 5 seconds with an animated loading indicator.
frontend/src/components/TopBar.tsx: A top navigation bar showing the channel name, online user count, an admin panel button (owner only), and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/TypingIndicatorB: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminCommands.ts: An empty file with no content or exports.
A hook that watches chat messages for @G.ai mentions, sends the question to OpenAI, and injects the bot's response as a new chat message.
frontend/src/hooks/useBanManager.ts: Provides a React hook for managing user bans stored in localStorage, with utilities to ban, unban, check ban status, and retrieve remaining ban duration.
Manages chat messages by polling a backend actor for new messages, merging them with deduplication via fingerprinting, and syncing across tabs using BroadcastChannel with localStorage as a cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatLock.ts: Provides a hook to track and check whether the global chat is locked, listening for lock/unlock events via BroadcastChannel and exempting specific users like 'AI.Caffeine'.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatModeration.ts: Automatically moderates incoming chat messages using OpenAI's moderation API, banning users and sending a bot warning message when disrespectful content is detected.
Implements a keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+C then C) to clear chat messages, showing a confirmation toast with a 5-second timeout before dismissal.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmojiPickerShortcu: Toggles the emoji picker visibility via a Ctrl+Alt keyboard shortcut.
frontend/src/hooks/useHighlights.ts: Manages per-user highlight colors stored in localStorage, updating state when highlight events are received via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, supporting login, logout, and persisted identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useMOTD.ts: Manages the Message of the Day (MOTD) stored in localStorage, listening for set/clear events via BroadcastChannel and supporting user dismissal.
frontend/src/hooks/useMuteManager.ts: Provides a React hook for managing timed user mutes in localStorage, with periodic pruning of expired entries and cross-tab sync via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/hooks/usePinnedMessages.ts: Manages a single pinned chat message persisted in localStorage, updating state when pin/unpin events are received via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty compatibility stub; data management is delegated to the useBroadcastMessages hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useServerState.ts: React hook that reads and tracks server shutdown/startup state from localStorage and a BroadcastChannel, auto-restoring state when a timed shutdown expires and briefly showing a startup overlay.
frontend/src/hooks/useShadowban.ts: React hook that reads the shadowbanned users list from localStorage and listens for shadowban/unshadowban broadcast events to keep the list in sync, exposing whether a given username is shadowbanned.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlowMode.ts: React hook that manages slow-mode state from localStorage and BroadcastChannel updates, providing helpers to check per-user cooldowns and record when a message was sent.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind with light/dark CSS custom properties, sets Discord-inspired scrollbar styles, and defines keyframe animations (slideIn, rainbow, shake, confetti, birthday, fadeIn).
frontend/src/lib/adminState.ts: Defines localStorage key constants for admin-controlled chat features and provides typed getter functions for pinned messages, highlights, shadowbans, slow mode, lock state, MOTD, and theme.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Implements localStorage-based user authentication with account creation, login, and session management, seeding a default 'AI.Caffeine' owner account on module load.
frontend/src/lib/broadcastControl.ts: Singleton utility that wraps a BroadcastChannel for the globalchat_server_control channel, exposing subscribe/unsubscribe and a broadcastEvent function for cross-tab communication.
frontend/src/lib/caffeineAI.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/lib/exportChatLog.ts: Reads chat messages from localStorage and triggers a JSON file download of the full chat log.
frontend/src/lib/modLog.ts: Provides CRUD helpers for a moderation log stored in localStorage, capped at 100 entries, with typed ModLogEntry records.
frontend/src/lib/openai.ts: Wraps the OpenAI chat completions API with key storage helpers and exposes a chatCompletion function plus a moderateMessage utility that flags disrespectful content via GPT-4o-mini.
frontend/src/lib/serverState.ts: Manages server shutdown/startup state in localStorage with helpers to set, get, and format shutdown timers, including duration parsing and countdown formatting.
frontend/src/lib/userBadges.tsx: Defines a helper to check if a username is the verified owner ('AI.Caffeine') and a VerifiedOwnerBadge component that renders a gold crown icon with a tooltip.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat page component that orchestrates messaging, moderation hooks (mute, ban, slow mode, chat lock), admin panel, AI mention detection, online user tracking, and channel renaming via BroadcastChannel.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Authentication landing page with login and account-creation modes, handling form validation and delegating to auth utilities before navigating to the chat.
frontend/src/types/chat.ts: Defines the ChatMessage TypeScript interface with fields for id, username, text, timestamp, and optional flags like isBot, isSystem, and isBroadcast.
frontend/src/utils/sampleMessages.ts: Generates a set of sample chat messages from predefined users and seeds them into localStorage if no messages exist yet.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining Discord-inspired, neon, and retro color palettes, custom font, border radius tokens, accordion animations, and typography/container-query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 31) describing the Global Chat app's architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions including BroadcastChannel messaging, OpenAI moderation, and the hardcoded owner account.
